A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly filtering troubled NASDAQ symbols and listing available trade tables, the agent repeatedly attempted to compute 2008 average volumes via execute_python but encountered syntax errors (IndentationError and "unterminated string literal") as shown in the execute_python calls, leading it to return an error message instead of the required results.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@
